inputs.label: Inches
inputs.businessContext: Length in inches, e.g., from machine dimensions or product specs

businessContext_i18n.en: Length in inches, e.g., from machine dimensions or product specs
businessContext_i18n.tr: İnç cinsinden uzunluk, örn. makine boyutları veya ürün özelliklerinden
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge in Zoll, z. B. aus Maschinenabmessungen oder Produktspezifikationen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur en pouces, par exemple d'après les dimensions de la machine ou les spécifications produit
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud en pulgadas, p. ej., de dimensiones de máquina o especificaciones de producto
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطول بالبوصة، مثلاً من أبعاد الماكينة أو مواصفات المنتج

inputs.label: Calibration Offset
inputs.businessContext: Systematic measurement instrument offset in inches

businessContext_i18n.en: Systematic measurement instrument offset in inches
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage systématique de l'instrument de mesure en pouces
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación sistemática del instrumento de medición en pulgadas

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
inputs.businessContext: Relative uncertainty (k=2) to compute expanded uncertainty in cm

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative uncertainty (k=2) to compute expanded uncertainty in cm
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genişletilmiş belirsizliği cm cinsinden hesaplamak için bağıl belirsizlik (k=2)
businessContext_i18n.de: Relative Unsicherheit (k=2) zur Berechnung der erweiterten Unsicherheit in cm
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude relative (k=2) pour calculer l'incertitude élargie en cm
businessContext_i18n.es: Incertidumbre relativa (k=2) para calcular la incertidumbre expandida en cm
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدم اليقين النسبي (k=2) لحساب عدم اليقين الموسع بالسنتيمتر

inputs.label: Tolerance (±)
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable deviation in mm, e.g., ISO 2768-m

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceptable deviation in mm, e.g., ISO 2768-m
businessContext_i18n.tr: mm cinsinden kabul edilebilir sapma, örn. ISO 2768-m
businessContext_i18n.de: Zulässige Abweichung in mm, z. B. ISO 2768-m
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart acceptable en mm, par exemple ISO 2768-m
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación aceptable en mm, p. ej., ISO 2768-m

businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur während der Messung für Stahl (CTE ~11,5e-6/K)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température lors de la mesure pour l'acier (CTE ~11,5e-6/K)
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura durante la medición para acero (CTE ~11.5e-6/K)
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة الحرارة أثناء القياس للصلب (معامل التمدد الحراري ~11.5e-6/K)
معامل التمدد الحراري الخطي للمادة (الصلب ~11.5e-6، الألومنيوم ~23e-6)

businessContext_i18n.fr: Référence pour les dimensions du matériau (généralement 20°C)

breakdown: Step 1 – Raw conversion: (inches + calibrationOffset) × conversionFactor = rawCm cm
Step 2 – Thermal expansion correction: 1 + α × (T_meas – T_ref) = thermalCorrection factor
Step 3 – Final converted length: rawCm × thermalCorrection = convertedLengthCm cm
Step 4 – Expanded uncertainty (k=2): convertedLengthCm × (uncertainty%/100) = expandedUncertaintyCm cm
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
